testcase.name: testGetEnrollments_ExistingStudentReturnsExpectedCourses
testcase.system-out:

testcase.name: testGetActiveStudents_Integration
testcase.system-out: 2026-03-20T04:00:27.195+08:00 DEBUG 69792 --- [ main] o.s.web.client.RestTemplate : HTTP GET http://localhost:49329/api/v1/students/active 2026-03-20T04:00:27.213+08:00 DEBUG 69792 --- [ main] o.s.web.client.RestTemplate : Accept=[application/json, application/*+json] 2026-03-20T04:00:27.223+08:00 DEBUG 69792 --- [o-auto-1-exec-3] o.s.web.servlet.DispatcherServlet : GET "/api/v1/students/active", parameters={} 2026-03-20T04:00:27.228+08:00 DEBUG 69792 --- [o-auto-1-exec-3] s.w.s.m.m.a.RequestMappingHandlerMapping : Mapped to com.lms.backend.controller.StudentController#getActiveStudents() 2026-03-20T04:00:27.243+08:00 DEBUG 69792 --- [o-auto-1-exec-3] m.m.a.RequestResponseBodyMethodProcessor : Using 'application/json', given [application/json, application/*+json] and supported [application/json, application/*+json] 2026-03-20T04:00:27.259+08:00 DEBUG 69792 --- [o-auto-1-exec-3] m.m.a.RequestResponseBodyMethodProcessor : Writing [[Student[id=10, name=John Doe], Student[id=11, name=Jane Smith]]] 2026-03-20T04:00:27.267+08:00 DEBUG 69792 --- [o-auto-1-exec-3] o.s.web.servlet.DispatcherServlet : Completed 200 OK 2026-03-20T04:00:27.268+08:00 DEBUG 69792 --- [ main] o.s.web.client.RestTemplate : Response 200 OK 2026-03-20T04:00:27.277+08:00 DEBUG 69792 --- [ main] o.s.web.client.RestTemplate : Reading to [com.lms.backend.model.Student[]]

testcase.name: testGetEnrollments_InvalidId
testcase.system-out: 2026-03-20T04:00:27.441+08:00 DEBUG 69792 --- [ main] o.s.web.client.RestTemplate : HTTP GET http://localhost:49329/api/v1/students/999/enrollments 2026-03-20T04:00:27.443+08:00 DEBUG 69792 --- [ main] o.s.web.client.RestTemplate : Accept=[application/json, application/*+json] 2026-03-20T04:00:27.448+08:00 DEBUG 69792 --- [o-auto-1-exec-1] o.s.web.servlet.DispatcherServlet : GET "/api/v1/students/999/enrollments", parameters={} 2026-03-20T04:00:27.449+08:00 DEBUG 69792 --- [o-auto-1-exec-1] s.w.s.m.m.a.RequestMappingHandlerMapping : Mapped to com.lms.backend.controller.StudentController#getEnrollments(Long) 2026-03-20T04:00:27.451+08:00 DEBUG 69792 --- [o-auto-1-exec-1] m.m.a.RequestResponseBodyMethodProcessor : Using 'application/json', given [application/json, application/*+json] and supported [application/json, application/*+json] 2026-03-20T04:00:27.451+08:00 DEBUG 69792 --- [o-auto-1-exec-1] m.m.a.RequestResponseBodyMethodProcessor : Writing [[]] 2026-03-20T04:00:27.452+08:00 DEBUG 69792 --- [o-auto-1-exec-1] o.s.web.servlet.DispatcherServlet : Completed 200 OK 2026-03-20T04:00:27.452+08:00 DEBUG 69792 --- [ main] o.s.web.client.RestTemplate : Response 200 OK 2026-03-20T04:00:27.453+08:00 DEBUG 69792 --- [ main] o.s.web.client.RestTemplate : Reading to [java.lang.Object[]]
